organization: Google Developer Groups on Campus Haliç
title: Vice President
comment:
- Organizing events, workshops, and meetups attended by 100+ members that bring together developers and tech lovers in our community
- Working with the social media team to create fun and engaging social media content to promote our events and showcase what we're doing
- Managing and advising our project team on how to build impactful projects for competitions like Teknofest and Tübitak
- Actively contributing to projects related to both the community and our project team
- Giving workshops to help students in our campus to learn new topics and engage with tech

Organized Events: Python Crash Course, Coffee Talks, Git & Github Workshop, Notion 101
